title: My Vanilla
body:
## My take on vanilla textures!. Vanilla-style resource pack 
![Wooden stuff](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e60fb1565112b4e965c28cc43a9b61e70b5cad74.png)
### What it does
Makes every tool/weapon type look diffrent from each other soo its not just a recolor.
Adds some details to the textures making them more "realistic" in a way.
Its not changing everythink, made to be a complementary for vannila textures/mods/other resorspacks 


### Working on right now 
status: (working right now on updating almoust all textures in the pack and adding a lot more)

- Some mobs 
- Misc 
- Some items
